mapper.select: SELECT pet_id, pet_name, pet_image_url, acquisition_type, max_level, badge_name, badge_image_url, description FROM PET WHERE acquisition_type = 'default' ORDER BY pet_id
SELECT pet_id, pet_name, pet_image_url, acquisition_type, max_level, badge_name, badge_image_url, description FROM PET WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND acquisition_type = 'default'

SELECT cp.child_pet_id, cp.child_id, cp.pet_id, cp.current_level, cp.current_exp, cp.is_active, cp.is_maxed, cp.badge_acquired, cp.badge_acquired_at, cp.acquired_at, p.pet_name, p.pet_image_url, p.acquisition_type, p.max_level, p.badge_name, p.badge_image_url, p.description FROM CHILD_PET cp JOIN PET p ON p.pet_id = cp.pet_id WHERE cp.child_id = #{childId} AND cp.is_active = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE CHILD_PET cp SET cp.current_exp = LEAST( ((SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id) - 1) * 300, cp.current_exp + #{expAmount} ), cp.current_level = LEAST( (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id), FLOOR((cp.current_exp + #{expAmount}) / 300) + 1 ), cp.is_maxed = CASE WHEN LEAST( (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id), FLOOR((cp.current_exp + #{expAmount}) / 300) + 1 ) = (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id) THEN 'Y' ELSE cp.is_maxed END, cp.badge_acquired = CASE WHEN LEAST( (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id), FLOOR((cp.current_exp + #{expAmount}) / 300) + 1 ) = (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id) THEN 'Y' ELSE cp.badge_acquired END, cp.badge_acquired_at = CASE WHEN cp.badge_acquired = 'N' AND LEAST( (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id), FLOOR((cp.current_exp + #{expAmount}) / 300) + 1 ) = (SELECT p.max_level FROM PET p WHERE p.pet_id = cp.pet_id) THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE cp.badge_acquired_at END WHERE cp.child_id = #{childId} AND cp.is_active = 'Y'

MERGE INTO PET_INTERACTION_COOLDOWN target USING ( SELECT cp.child_pet_id, #{actionType} action_type FROM CHILD_PET cp WHERE cp.child_id = #{childId} AND cp.is_active = 'Y' ) source ON ( target.child_pet_id = source.child_pet_id AND target.action_type = source.action_type ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.last_rewarded_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE target.last_rewarded_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( child_pet_id, action_type, last_rewarded_at ) VALUES ( source.child_pet_id, source.action_type, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT pic.action_type, pic.last_rewarded_at FROM PET_INTERACTION_COOLDOWN pic JOIN CHILD_PET cp ON cp.child_pet_id = pic.child_pet_id WHERE cp.child_id = #{childId} AND cp.is_active = 'Y'
